name: Volt Prime
description: A glorious warrior from the past, Volt Prime features the same abilities as Volt but with unique mod polarities for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Grounded movement generates an electrical charge building up |DAMAGE| Damage per meter that is unleashed with the next attack.

abilities.name: Shock
abilities.description: Launch a voltaic projectile that stuns and damages its target. A chain of electricity extends from the target to shock nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Speed
abilities.description: Embody an electric current. Volt and his allies receive a brief movement speed boost and a reload speed buff.

abilities.name: Electric Shield
abilities.description:
Volt deploys an electric shield that blocks enemy fire and adds <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity Damage to projectiles.
 
HOLD to equip the shield for mobile cover.

abilities.name: Discharge
abilities.description: Volt discharges the electricity that courses through him. The shockwave paralyzes and damages nearby enemies. Enemies on the edge of the shockwave are stunned.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A glorious warrior from the past, Volt Prime features the same abilities as Volt but with unique mod polarities for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Volt Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Volt Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Volt Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: This will be the default moving forward if we release more Voidshell skins with Armor attachments. For now this fixes Voruna, Frost and Volt’s Base/Voidshell Armor.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes:
Was: Allies can pick up Electric Shield. 300% of damage absorbed will be added to Volt’s Static Discharge. 
Volt can now cast more Electric Shields while carrying one. This change applies to the base ability as well!

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt being unable to pick up or carry his Shield after his Energy drops to 0.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Fixed using Archon Stretch with Volt’s Discharge causing FPS to plummet for Host.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Volt Technoshock Skin & Helmet by kakarrot2812
Starter Warframe Ability Changes: Excalibur, Mag, & Volt
Swapped Volt Specter Junction location (Venus to Mercury) with Rhino Specter (Earth to Venus). 
Volt Specter is easier overall (due to his abilities being more obviously telegraphed), and was therefore more fitting of an earlier Junction.
patchlogs.fixes:
This update also has a heavy focus on Quality of Life (QOL) changes including a rework to Spearguns, the three starter Warframes (Excalibur, Mag, and Volt), improvements to Riven database collecting, a whole slew of  Warframe Augment Mod buffs, and more to be discovered below.
Fixed duration timer in HUD for Volt’s Speed disappearing if another member of the squad is playing Volt and casts Speed at the same time.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when Volt’s Speed ability expires.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Volt’s Shock ability.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Saryn Voidshell Skin default emissive color to match the Rhino Voidshell and Volt Voidshell skins.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
In this update, we are debuting the first round of Voidshell Skins featuring Saryn, Volt, and Rhino! Each of these following skins are available in the in-game Market and come with their own Material Structure:
Volt Voidshell Skin
Volt’s Discharge 
Volt’s Speed

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Protovyre Syandana not attaching correctly to the Volt Electrolyst Skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.changes: Volt as he would have been, had the Sentients created him.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed playing as Volt during the tutorial allowing Electric Melee Damage to occur as a result of the passive.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes: For a long time now we’ve had a precedent with a handful of Warframe Skins where the “None” option for Attachments (and sometimes Syandanas) was removed if certain Skins, Primes, etc were equipped. This applied to Warframes such as Ember Prime/Pyraxis Skin, Frost, Mag Prime, Oberon, Volt, etc.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tenet Envoy's guided rockets being unable to pass through Volt's Shield and Gara's Vitrify.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur when using Transference next to a Volt Electric Shield with the Transistor Shield Augment equipped.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Transferring to the Operator while standing beside Volt’s Electric Shield resulting in auto picking up the Shield.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a harmless script error that would occur if you were using Volt's Speed during the Railjack loading space tunnel.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Akarius’ projectiles detonating on Volt’s Electric Shield instead of passing through it.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Protea losing her Temporal Anchor actions during rewind if during the ability she walked through Volt’s Electric Shield.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.6 + 28.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Protea’s Blaze Artillery will now shoot through Volt’s Shield, but won't benefit from its buffs.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Volt
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt's Shield causing Exodia Contagion's projectile to never explode.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.14
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Volt’s Discharge ability right when another player was joining-in-progress.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Hotfix 27.3.4
patchlogs.changes: Updated several Damage type tips in the mission load screen and removed outdated tips. Also moved a Volt ability tip to its proper home in his Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Volt: 15 to 100
Volt Prime: 100 to 125

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt visually missing his arm rings in his Codex/Market diorama.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect lightning textures on Volts. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1160559-bad-lightning-still-not-fixed/

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Volt’s Discharge ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some pixelation on Volt’s chest.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.7.2 + 25.7.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Prime Details toggle not behaving properly for TennoGen Skins on Volt Prime.
Fixed Volt’s electricity FX and Umbra’s Howl FX appearing as lines instead of lightning beams.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inconsistent text for the Capacitance Mod on Volt when looking at the Mod and in the stats page when the Mod is at Rank 0 and 2.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zanuka being unable to capture Hildryn, Wisp, Revenant, Chroma, Frost, Excalibur, Inaros, Nova, Vauban, Volt, Wukong, Ash, Hydroid, Mag, Trinity, Titania and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the brightness of Volt Prime’s electricity to fix dimness.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Respective Ability videos now also appear upon hover-over to add that little extra spice! This initial Ability video aspect is currently functional for Excalibur, Mag, Volt, Garuda, Baruuk, Revenant, and Hildryn! More to gradually come!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a delay in Tonkor’s grenade explosion that occurred when the grenade passed through Volt’s Shield.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.3.0 - Nightwave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing sound when re-Casting Volt’s Speed Ability.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Removed 'next shot damage bonus' from Mods or other sources being applied to the Tranq Rifle. This also prevents Volt’s Passive from unintentionally killing animals.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Discharge not hitting any enemies after reaching Zone 2 in an Sanctuary Onslaught mission.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed certain wave projectiles (e.g. Arca Plasmor) bouncing off hit proxy shields (e.g. Volt’s Electric Shield, Gara’s Mass Vitrify).

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Phahd Scaffold projectiles not passing through Volt’s Electric Shield.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.4.0
patchlogs.changes: through Standing. Choose from Excalibur, Volt and Mag, each with their unique Ability. Unlock additional Frame Fighter Warframes by discovering Fragments throughout the Solar Chart. If the scanned Warframe’s Prime is in your Inventory, you can toggle to the Prime version of the acquired character

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.7
patchlogs.additions: GPU particle hotness has been added to Volt’s Idle animation as noted here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/8msg7o/what_happened_to_old_volts_idle_animation_physx/.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes: Volt Fulgursor Skin by Vulbjorn, the graphical walrus.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed being unable to use your Primary weapon when Transferring in-out of the Operator while holding Volt’s Transistor Shield.
Fixed Voltage Sequence not applying to Grineer Hellions.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Capacitance Augment giving Shields to Operators.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Speed not properly creating FX for non-Volts.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.changes: We are not shipping Damage 2.5 changes simply because we'd have less than a day to Hotfix issues. This applies to Volt changes too. We do not want to ship something that we are unable to Hotfix for more than a week.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Mirage Prime 22.7.0
patchlogs.changes: You can now swap to your primary weapon while holding Volt's Electric Shield, doing this will drop the Electric Shield. You can drop the Electric Shield as before to avoid switching to another weapon.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt Proto skin and Diode Hammer skin not being linkable in chat.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated Volt Proto Skin Market banner.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.5.0 + 22.5.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the passive 5 Energy per second drain from Volt’s Electric Shield when moving with it. The 1 Energy per meter drain remains.
patchlogs.fixes:
Delve into the past with this experimental prototype skin for Volt.
Make sparks fly with Volt Proto’s signature hammer skin.
Volt Proto’s signature Syandana.
Charge up Volt with this collection of items that includes the Volt Proto Skin, Diode Hammer Skin, and Cathode Syandana.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed amps built using Shwaak Prism and Shraksun Scaffold not passing through Volt’s Electric Shield.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the radius on a light used on a few of Volt's abilities.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Transistor Shield Energy drain when moving applying to elevators.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.2.0 + 21.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Volt Arrester Helmet tintmask.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Updated the Frost Zastruga Helmet, Ersatz Loki Helmet, and Zener Volt Skin at each creator’s request.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Volt’s Shock.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Volt’s Discharge.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt's Electric Shield blocking his own throwing Melee weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where the Opticor would explode on Volt's Electric Shield instead of simply passing through and amplifying the damage.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0new Augmentsexcalibur (Exalted Blade)Mag (Magnetize)Chroma (Effigy)Volt (Electric Shield)Find These New Augments As Syndicate Offerings Today!Changes:

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.2
patchlogs.changes: Volt’s armor can now be used on Volt Prime so TennoGen Skins can look as intended.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.6.0 + 20.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Igaro Syandana clipping into Volt’s legs.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.additions:
Volt Zener Skin by Rekkou
Volt Capacitor Skin by Del

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting one-handed abilities (Volt’s Shock, Ember’s Fireball, etc) canceling weapon reloads.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Voltage Sequence being Uncommon when it should be Rare.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Volt’s Speed.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a color discrepancy with the Volt Graxx skin biceps.
Fixed a memory leak with Volt’s Passive while idle in your Landing Craft that caused a crash.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Synthesis Scanner counting as ‘next shot’ or ‘next hit’ for the purpose of some Warframe Abilities/Passives (Volt’s Static Passive, Mesa’s Ballistic Battery, etc).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Volt’s Discharge no longer causes damage to Golem’s weak points in The Jordas Verdict. This was allowing Nerves to be destroyed without completing the prerequisite puzzles.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.changes: Removed 'Hasten Coil' from Volt’s Speed ability description as the Hasten Coil was removed awhile back.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed very fast Volts not building up Static Discharge.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s passive being affected by the Operator

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced Volt's Shock damage in Conclave.
Increased Volt's Shock radius from 8 to 10m in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.3
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed Volt's Arrester helmet having tinting issues.
Fixed missing link to Tethra's Doom mods in the codex (was preventing Jolt and Voltaic Strike from showing up in the codex).

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to cancel Volt's Speed buff with a backflip when you have a gun equipped as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/697384-cant-cancel-volts-speed/

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a couple Dedicated Server script errors with Volt’s Overload and Spira Prime.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.changes: Removed the smudge motion blur from Volt's Speed ability.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.changes: Corrected the Ducat pricing for Nyx Prime Systems and Volt Prime Chassis, they were using the common sell price when they are uncommon drops.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes:
Decreased duration of Volt’s Shield in Conclave
Removed duration reduction and reduced Energy drain when picking up Volt’s Shield in Conclave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Discharge not applying diminishing returns to duration.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed meshes getting distorted when Field of View was increased (either deliberately or from effects like Volt Speed or Mesa Peacemaker).

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced Volt Prime’s Conclave Mobility base stat to 0.8
Decreased damage of Volt’s Shock in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Volt’s Passive, Static Discharge, not contributing additional Electricity damage to his Electric Shields.
Fixed an issue with Paracyst and Radial Javelin attacks not properly passing through or being amplified by Volt Shields.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix: Lunaro 6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Speed trail FX disappearing when recasted.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix: Lunaro 5
patchlogs.changes:
Volt’s Electric Shield will now ragdoll enemies when being carried while sprinting, like so: https://gfycat.com/FairFarflungAndeancockoftherock
Volt's Speed has been reverted to instantly affect allies in the cast radius, rather than create a pick-up. 
Allies can now backflip(aim + directional roll backwards)  to remove Volt’s Speed if they wish to opt-out.

patchlogs.name: Update: Lunaro
patchlogs.changes: •    Other context actions will take priority over picking up Volt’s Electric Shield. This prevents accidentally picking up the Electric Shield that you placed down to protect you while you revive your fellow Tenno.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.14.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Volt’s Speed FX trail lingering after the ability had ended if you were a Client.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the sound radius on Volt’s Speed pickup for allies. 
Fixed Volt’s Electric Shield lingering for other players after disappearing for the caster.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.changes: •    Updated textures on the Volt AMP TennoGen skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed projectiles creating a Hit FX when shot through Volt’s Electric Shield.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the range of Volt’s Overload in Conclave.
Volt’s Shock and Overload will no longer be able to electrocute boss-type enemies.
The Quanta, Mutalist Quanta, and Volt have all been given a PBR update.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt Prime becoming jet black when equipped with the Volt Immortal Skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Castanas not having a duration if they pass through Volt's Electric Shield in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue where Volt’s Shock Ability would shoot into the sky when not targeting an enemy.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes:
Mag, Volt and Excalibur are now purchasable through Teshin’s Conclave Offerings at the Typhoon rank.
Increased the damage of Volt’s Shock in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ember's Fireblast, Vauban's Vortex and Volt's Electric Shield Abilities being cancelled when you enter a Nullifier Bubble.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Electric Shield not functioning on guns with punch through.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Voltaic Lance

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Electric Shield giving every ranged projectile a 70m default range. Important note: we will be revisiting the design to allow for interesting range interactions with Volt's Shield and guns ASAP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Volt's Shock damage increased in PvP

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes:
This helmet is worn by Volt, and increases Power Strength, but reduces duration of Aim Glide and Wall Latch.
Volt's Shock damage has been reduced in PvP.
Volt's Overload damage has been reduced in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.11.3
patchlogs.fixes: this fix resolves anyone who had purchased Ash Prime vs crafting!) This should also fix some users with un-Arcaneable Volt Prime helmets.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Volt’s Overload will now cause destructive visual effects on nearby active light fixtures when used.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Volt's Shock damage  has been reduced in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue that allowed the Dera to retain damage bonuses from Volt’s Electric Shield, resulting in higher than normal damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.5 + 16.4.5.1 + 16.4.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tonkor and Penta not being affected by Volt’s Electric Shield as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/446728-tonkor-does-not-seem-to-be-affected-by-electric-shield/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.4 + 16.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt’s Electric Shield giving improper damage multipliers as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/446810-volt-shield-quanta-vandel-absurd-damage/

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Volt’s Electric Shield is now more visible when used with dark/black energy.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed error that would allow Punch Through Mods to create unlimited multishot when a weapon is fired through Volt’s Electric Shield.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased Volt’s Overload field expansion speed, but reduced its range and duration in PvP.
Volt’s Shocking Speed effect now has accompanying audio.
Fixed Volt Prime’s blurry textures.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.5
patchlogs.fixes: Improved the texture details on Volt Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Volt’s Shock will now apply his energy color to the electrocuted proc that targets receive.
Fixed broken Harkonar physics on Volt.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.1: Volt Prime
patchlogs.fixes:
Volt Prime and the newest Prime Gear is here!
A shocking agent of death, Volt Prime speeds into Prime Access.
Get Volt Prime Access now and make the newest Primes yours 
including Volt Prime, Odonata Prime, Edo Prime Armor and the Kazeru Prime Sugatra. Plus, stock up on discounted Platinum and get Exclusive Gear available only through Prime Access!
Harness electricity and bring high damage with Volt Prime, the newest addition to the ranks of elite Prime Warframes.
Modify your Warframe with the Edo Prime Armor and Kazeru Prime Sugatra. Add Exclusive Volt Prime Avatars to your online presence! Speed up your in-game progress with 90-Day Affinity and Credit Boosters.
You can begin to hunt for Volt Prime parts using our drop tables for guidance: https://forums.warfr...drop-locations/
Volt’s Overload is now more noticeable in PvP, particularly for players using black energy.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced the damage of Volt’s Shock ability in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.changes:
Improved Volt’s Overload FX to more accurately show the range of the attack.
Improved the quality of Volt’s shock FX.
patchlogs.fixes: Volt

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.7
patchlogs.changes: Restored Volt’s speed trail visuals.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted Volt’s Shocking Speed Augment visuals to be a little more subtle.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes:
Updated audio and visual FX on Volt’s Shock Ability.  
Volt’s Shock Trooper

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed minor color issues occurring on electric procs within Volt’s Overload sphere.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Volt's Overload not showing up on the Abilities screen.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: CORVETTE (Corpus Flak Ship): Voltage grenades detonate to create an electric field.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Volt’s Shield ability not amplifying the damage of client projectiles that pass through them.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes:
Volt's Electric Shield now has a countdown timer. In the case of multiple spawned shields, the time for the last spawned one will be displayed (similar to Frost's Snowglobe).
Improved the cast sound for Volt's Speed ability.
patchlogs.fixes: Excalibur, Mag, and Volt now make up the starter Warframe options.

patchlogs.name: 13.9.0 + 13.9.0.1: The Venka
patchlogs.fixes: Changes made to Volt’s Shield Ability in response to a fix made last week. Before there was an issue that casting 2 or more of Volt’s Shields would stop projectiles from reaching their end destination. We fixed this so projectiles could pass through as many shields that were deployed, but the damage multiplier stacked, resulting in broken numbers. We have returned the damage multiplier to it’s normal value to be calculated once, and shields no longer stack this multiplier.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Tweaked the visual effects of Volt's Shock ability.
Fixes self-inflicted death wounds being caused by throwing Glaives through Volt or Nyx's energy shields/bubbles.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.5.2 + 13.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Volt Arcane Pulse helmet having an incorrect tooltip.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.changes:
Shield: increased size of Volt’s Shield for better team usage.
Reduced the amount of motion blur seen from Volt's Speed ability.
Tweaked the ability and energy visuals on numerous Warframes including Rhino, Frost, Nova, Ash, Banshee, Zephyr, Vauban, Volt and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: • Reduced the amount of distortion seen in Volt's shield ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed graphical issues with Volt/Alad V shields.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Volt being unable to melee if Overload was active or lingering.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Volt Chassis dropping instead of Volt Chassis Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Volt’s blueprints added to Mission Reward tables. We would like to clarify here that the original U11 notes suggested that his former Boss, J3Golem, would be dropping them in systemic invasions. This is no longer the case, and his parts can be found by playing various missions.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.3: Hotter Than Ruk’S Guns!
patchlogs.changes: Volt's electric effects will now create a dynamic light that matches your energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: For information on Volt, see Update 11.1.0: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/139326-update-1110/

patchlogs.name: Update 10.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Volt's Speed boost won't affect other player's FOV
Small performance improvements to Volt's overload, was creating a lot of particles/unneeded scripts in a single frame

patchlogs.name: Update 9.8
patchlogs.changes: Volt’s Speed ability trail FX now last the duration of the power.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Volt Speed not being affected by power duration mods for clients

patchlogs.name: Update 9.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fix Volt Overload creating two effects on clients.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Volt audio revisions on abilities.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.2.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fix Volt Shock chains not using correct energy colour.
Fix Volt Speed FX not using correct energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Volt’s Speed ability not making you jog faster.
Fixed Volt’s Shock ability to chain properly off turrets and cameras.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Volt Speed not making you jog faster

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Volt's Shock "Power in Use" bug.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Volt’s Overload DPS increased and casting time reduced.
Fixed Volt’s shield – it now functions as intended which is to allow shots to fire through from Warframes with increased damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.changes: Volt: Speed: Now a radial group buff, All Tenno in a radius around the caster will get a speed and melee weapon speed increase (speed, range, duration all increase with fusion level). Range (15,20,22,25) Speed (10%,15%,25%,50%) Duration (5,6,8,10).
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed lag and FX issues when shooting through Volt’s shield.
Fixed missing animation with Volt's Overload.

patchlogs.name: 8.0.5: It's Getting Hot(Fix) In Here
patchlogs.fixes: Volt in Void Missions fixed.

patchlogs.name: 5.4 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes:
-Energy cost changes for Volt and Ash.
-Fixes for Volt overload being over-powered, then under-powered. Does radial damage as well.

patchlogs.name: Update 5.3 - "Blazing Embers"
patchlogs.additions: Warframe Blueprints for Excalibur, Volt and Loki.
